description: An HSE administrator needs to ensure that all employees have completed their annual safety refresher training.

nodes.task_description: Run a report from the learning management system (LMS) to identify any employees whose safety refresher training is expired or due to expire.

expected_outcome.value: A list of non-compliant employees is generated.

nodes.task_description: Automatically send reminder notifications to the employees and their supervisors.

expected_outcome.value: Reminders are sent to all affected employees.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the non-compliant employees into the next available safety refresher training session.

expected_outcome.value: All employees are scheduled for training, ensuring the site remains 100% compliant.
